purpose: Russian market price slice — bypass EU access-pattern gap via domestic RUB sources
trigger: EU distributor sites (safety5000.com, laropadetrabajo.com) both ECONNREFUSED/SSL-timeout. Owner suggestion: search Russian segment.
source_used: vseinstrumenti.ru — major Russian B2B distributor, listed as official Honeywell dealer

script_results.note: Category page URL used — lineage fails because PN not matched on category listing by script. Price confirmed via WebFetch. Out-of-stock catalog reference price per ENRICHMENT-DISCONTINUED-PRICE-VALID-REFERENCE-001.
EU variant gap CLOSED via Russian domestic market. 1012541 priced at 5356 RUB on vseinstrumenti.ru. Out-of-stock reference price. RUB = no FX conversion needed.

key_findings.eu_gap_resolution: 1012541 EU variant price found on Russian market (5356 RUB) — gap was EU distributor access-pattern gap, not global source gap. Russian market carries EU PPE variants with RUB pricing.
key_findings.rub_passthrough: RUB prices pass through fx module cleanly: rub_price = price_per_unit, fx_normalization_status=normalized, no fx_gap. Domestic currency path works correctly.
key_findings.vseinstrumenti_access: Script (requests.py) blocked by vseinstrumenti.ru (access_denied_or_non_html). WebFetch worked for category page. Consistent with other major Russian retailers requiring JS rendering.
key_findings.lineage_gap: Category URL is not an exact product page — lineage=False expected. Next step: find individual product page URLs for 1015021 and 1012541 on vseinstrumenti.ru for proper lineage confirmation.

new_domains_for_registry.access_notes: Script blocked (access_denied_or_non_html). WebFetch accessible for category pages. Individual product URLs needed for lineage confirmation.
new_domains_for_registry.note: Major Russian B2B distributor and official Honeywell dealer. Confirmed prices for 1015021 (4314 RUB) and 1012541 (5356 RUB) via WebFetch. trust.py has no entry — add as ru_b2b tier.
